papers.title: High-Resolution Laser Spectroscopy on the Hyperfine Structure of $^{255}\mathrm{Fm}$ ($Z=100$)
papers.summary: Author(s): Mitzi Urquiza-González et al.We report on high-resolution laser spectroscopy of $^{255}\mathrm{Fm}$ (${T}_{1/2}=20\text{ }\text{ }\mathrm{h}$), one of the heaviest nuclides available from reactor breeding. The hyperfine structures in two different atomic ground-state transitions at 398.4 nm and 398.2 nm were probed by in-source…[Phys. Rev. Lett. 136, 192501] Published Fri May 15, 2026
